hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】随着加息押注触及每一个对冲点，比特币和黄金一起下跌；【CRYPTO】实时更新：比特币面临 SpaceX、美联储利率和 Mythos 的阻力，下一步将何去何从；【FINANCE】热点就业报告显示美联储进一步降息遥不可及，主席沃什面临政策考验。

items.title: Bitcoin and gold fall together as a rate-hike bet hits every hedge
items.summary: The relief rally that lifted crypto off last week's lows is unwinding alongside tech stocks and gold, with traders bracing for a US inflation print and a Warsh Fed that may stay hawkish.
items.title_zh: 随着加息押注触及每一个对冲点，比特币和黄金一起下跌
items.summary_zh: 使加密货币脱离上周低点的缓解性反弹正在与科技股和黄金一起回落，交易员准备迎接美国通胀数据和沃什美联储可能保持鹰派立场。

items.title: Live updates: What's next for bitcoin as it faces headwinds from SpaceX, Fed rates, and Mythos
items.summary: Anthropic's IPO pipeline, not its new model, is what crypto traders should track.
items.title_zh: 实时更新：比特币面临 SpaceX、美联储利率和 Mythos 的阻力，下一步将何去何从
items.summary_zh: 加密货币交易者应该追踪的是 Anthropic 的 IPO 渠道，而不是其新模式。

items.title: Hot jobs report puts Fed cuts further out of reach as Chair Warsh faces policy tests
items.summary: Another big jobs report in May has swept aside the possibility of interest rate cuts anytime soon.
items.title_zh: 热点就业报告显示美联储进一步降息遥不可及，主席沃什面临政策考验
items.summary_zh: 五月份的另一份重要就业报告排除了近期降息的可能性。

items.title: Bitcoin is cratering, but a new Wall Street crypto hype is on the rise
items.summary: As bitcoin dropped to its lowest price since 2024, investors flock to a new type of crypto investment linked to the hyperliquid platforms, HYPE ETFs.
items.title_zh: 比特币正在崩溃，但华尔街新的加密货币炒作正在兴起
items.summary_zh: 随着比特币跌至 2024 年以来的最低价格，投资者纷纷涌向与超流动性平台相关的新型加密货币投资——HYPE ETF。

items.title: Where investors may find the next 'big wave' for AI trade
items.summary: Tim Urbanowicz, chief investment strategist at Innovator from Goldman Sachs Asset Management, tackles the AI boom.
items.title_zh: 投资者可能会在哪里找到人工智能贸易的下一个“大浪潮”
items.summary_zh: 高盛资产管理公司 Innovator 首席投资策略师 Tim Urbanowicz 应对人工智能热潮。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Trade Strikes in New Test of Cease-Fire
items.summary: The U.S. military struck southern Iran, calling it a response to the downing an American helicopter. Iran said it had retaliated by launching drones and missiles at U.S. military targets in Bahrain and Jordan.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：美国和伊朗的贸易打击是停火的新考验
items.summary_zh: 美国军方袭击了伊朗南部，称这是对击落一架美国直升机的回应。伊朗表示，已向巴林和约旦的美国军事目标发射无人机和导弹进行报复。

items.title: The Roar of ‘Cease-Fire’ in a Once-Thriving City
items.summary: The city of Nabatieh once spoke to the changing fortunes of Lebanon. Now, amid unending war, it speaks to the country’s worst fears.
items.title_zh: 曾经繁荣的城市中“停火”的咆哮
items.summary_zh: 纳巴蒂耶城曾经讲述过黎巴嫩命运的变化。现在，在无休止的战争中，它说出了这个国家最严重的恐惧。

items.title: How Endava is redesigning software delivery around AI agents
items.summary: Learn how Endava is using AI agents, ChatGPT Enterprise, and Codex to accelerate software delivery, automate workflows, and build an AI-native culture across the enterprise.
items.title_zh: Endava 如何围绕人工智能代理重新设计软件交付
items.summary_zh: 了解 Endava 如何使用 AI 代理、ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex 来加速软件交付、自动化工作流程并在整个企业中构建 AI 原生文化。

items.title: Drones Stray Into Neighboring Countries as Russia and Ukraine Battle
items.summary: Drones launched by both Russia and Ukraine are veering off course, menacing countries that are not at war and driving their citizens to seek shelter.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯和乌克兰交战时无人机误入邻国
items.summary_zh: 俄罗斯和乌克兰发射的无人机正在偏离航线，对未处于战争状态的国家构成威胁，并迫使其公民寻求庇护。

items.title: Bitcoin ETFs are no bigger today than when Trump won the election
items.summary: Net assets of U.S.-listed spot ETFs have fallen to levels last seen just after Trump won the election in early November 2024.
items.title_zh: 今天的比特币 ETF 规模并不比特朗普赢得大选时大
items.summary_zh: 美国上市现货 ETF 的净资产已降至 2024 年 11 月初特朗普赢得大选后的水平。

items.title: Inside Myanmar, rebels are losing ground as military forces men into army
items.summary: The BBC travels with rebels to frontline positions in Myanmar to see how the war is unfolding.
items.title_zh: 缅甸境内，武装分子正在节节败退，军队将男子编入军队
items.summary_zh: BBC 随叛乱分子前往缅甸前线阵地，了解战争的进展情况。

items.title: Banned referee Artan arrives home in Somalia
items.summary: Omar Artan vows to officiate at the 2030 World Cup instead after arriving home in Somalia in the wake of being banned from entering the United States.
items.title_zh: 被禁赛的裁判阿坦回到索马里的家中
items.summary_zh: 奥马尔·阿坦 (Omar Artan) 在被禁止进入美国后回到索马里，发誓要主持 2030 年世界杯。

items.title: Zelensky under pressure to end row with Poland over WW2 name of army unit
items.summary: Poland is threatening to strip Ukraine's president of a state honour over the naming Ukrainian military unit after controversial World War Two fighters.
items.title_zh: 泽伦斯基面临压力，要求结束与波兰关于二战陆军单位名称的争执
items.summary_zh: 波兰威胁要剥夺乌克兰总统的国家荣誉，因为它以有争议的第二次世界大战战士的名字命名了乌克兰军队。

items.title: How Quiet Oman Landed Itself in Trump’s Cross Hairs
items.summary: As the Iran war drags on, Oman — a U.S. ally and mediator with Iran — has found itself at odds with the Trump administration and some of its own neighbors.
items.title_zh: 安静的阿曼如何陷入特朗普的十字准线
items.summary_zh: 随着伊朗战争的拖延，阿曼——美国的盟友和伊朗的调解者——发现自己与特朗普政府和一些邻国存在分歧。

items.title: Germany Drops Plan to Build Warplane With Allies, Hindering Push to Rearm
items.summary: Berlin pulled out of the Future Combat Air System, a project with Spain and France that had been seen as central to European efforts to face down Russia and reduce reliance on the United States.
items.title_zh: 德国放弃与盟国共同制造战机的计划，阻碍重新武装的努力
items.summary_zh: 柏林退出了与西班牙和法国合作的未来作战空中系统项目，该项目被视为欧洲对抗俄罗斯和减少对美国依赖的努力的核心。

items.title: Japan's three largest banks aim for joint stablecoin issue by March
items.summary: MUFG, SMBC and Mizuho will establish a council to explore operational frameworks and prepare for the issuance of stablecoins.
items.title_zh: 日本三大银行计划在三月份联合发行稳定币
items.summary_zh: 三菱日联金融集团、SMBC 和瑞穗银行将成立一个委员会，探索运营框架并为稳定币的发行做准备。

items.title: XRP drops 4.5% as heavy selling breaks another support level
items.summary: XRP lost the $1.13 area on elevated volume, leaving traders focused on whether the latest selloff marks a final washout or the start of a deeper move toward $1.00.
items.title_zh: 由于大量抛售打破了另一个支撑位，XRP 下跌 4.5%
items.summary_zh: XRP 因成交量增加而失去了 1.13 美元区域，这让交易者关注最新的抛售是否标志着最终的下跌，还是进一步向 1.00 美元迈进的开始。

items.title: New York regulator proposes stablecoin rule to align with federal GENIUS Act, adds reserve limits
items.summary: The NYDFS has proposed a GENIUS Act-aligned stablecoin rule adding reserve concentration caps and mandatory risk management programs.
items.title_zh: 纽约监管机构提议稳定币规则与联邦天才法案保持一致，并增加准备金限额
items.summary_zh: NYDFS 提出了一项符合 GENIUS 法案的稳定币规则，增加了储备集中度上限和强制性风险管理计划。

items.title: Japan’s three megabanks to debut live stablecoin transactions by March 2027
items.summary: MUFG Bank, Mizuho Bank, and SMBC have set up a council to examine operational frameworks and governance for the stablecoin issuance.
items.title_zh: 日本三大银行将于 2027 年 3 月推出实时稳定币交易
items.summary_zh: 三菱日联银行、瑞穗银行和 SMBC 成立了一个委员会，负责审查稳定币发行的运营框架和治理。

items.title: EU proposes expanded sanctions on Russia-linked crypto platforms
items.summary: The European Commission may introduce a full ban on crypto services from non-EU countries that host platforms helping Russia evade sanctions.
items.title_zh: 欧盟提议扩大对与俄罗斯相关的加密平台的制裁
items.summary_zh: 欧盟委员会可能会全面禁止来自非欧盟国家的加密服务，这些国家拥有帮助俄罗斯逃避制裁的平台。

items.title: Washington man gets 5 years for helping $100 million crypto money laundering scheme
items.summary: Geoffrey K. Auyeung helped overseas fraudsters launder $100 million in scam proceeds through crypto and bank accounts, according to the DOJ.
items.title_zh: 华盛顿男子因帮助价值 1 亿美元的加密货币洗钱计划被判 5 年徒刑
items.summary_zh: 据司法部称，Geoffrey K. Auyeung 帮助海外欺诈者通过加密货币和银行账户洗钱 1 亿美元的诈骗收益。

items.title: Warren calls weakened CFTC a ‘recipe for disaster’ as Congress advances crypto legislation
items.summary: Senator Warren requested records related to staff departures, prediction market oversight and internal communications on the Clarity Act.
items.title_zh: 沃伦称随着国会推进加密货币立法，CFTC 的削弱是“灾难的秘诀”
items.summary_zh: 沃伦参议员要求提供与员工离职、预测市场监督和《澄清法案》内部沟通相关的记录。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bitcoin (BTC)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #1.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：比特币 (BTC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第一。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #134.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：人性 (H)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 134 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Audiera (BEAT)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #52.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Audiera (BEAT)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 52。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #11.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 11。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Zcash (ZEC)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #15.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：Zcash (ZEC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 15。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Economic Research Exchange
items.summary: OpenAI launches the Economic Research Exchange to study AI’s impact on jobs, productivity, and the economy. Applications are now open for selected research projects.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 经济研究交流中心简介
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 发起经济研究交流，以研究人工智能对就业、生产力和经济的影响。选定的研究项目现已开放申请。

items.title: The consequences of relying on AI for accurate news
items.summary: Media Lab study shows that, much like how GPS has weakened our navigation skills, AI can make us worse at detecting fake news.
items.title_zh: 依靠人工智能获取准确新闻的后果
items.summary_zh: 媒体实验室的研究表明，就像 GPS 削弱了我们的导航技能一样，人工智能也会让我们更不擅长检测假新闻。

items.title: Teaching AI agents to ask better questions by playing “Battleship”
items.summary: MIT researchers use the classic game as a test bed for AI agents, finding a small AI model can outperform the biggest ones at 1 percent of the cost.
items.title_zh: 通过玩“战舰”来教人工智能代理提出更好的问题
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员使用这款经典游戏作为 AI 代理的测试平台，发现小型 AI 模型可以以 1% 的成本超越最大的模型。

items.title: MIT researchers teach AI models to interpret charts
items.summary: The new ChartNet training dataset could improve the accuracy of vision-language models that help analyze business trends or interpret scientific figures.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员教人工智能模型解释图表
items.summary_zh: 新的 ChartNet 训练数据集可以提高视觉语言模型的准确性，帮助分析业务趋势或解释科学数据。

items.title: Technology usually creates jobs for young, skilled workers. Will AI do the same?
items.summary: A new study of the postwar U.S. shows which kinds of workers historically filled new tech-enabled jobs.
items.title_zh: 技术通常会为年轻的技术工人创造就业机会。人工智能也会这么做吗？
items.summary_zh: 一项针对战后美国的新研究显示了历史上哪些类型的工人担任了新技术支持的工作。

items.title: Kalshi trading in 'perps' crosses $1 billion in volume within a week of launch
items.summary: A spokesperson for the company said that the product is the fastest growing in the prediction market platform's history.
items.title_zh: Kalshi 的“perps”交易量在推出一周内就突破了 10 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 该公司发言人表示，该产品是预测市场平台历史上增长最快的产品。

items.title: Model who alleges Kanye West choked her tells BBC she felt 'suffocated and scared'
items.summary: West claims the encounter on a music video set was part of a "provocative theatrical performance".
items.title_zh: 声称坎耶·维斯特掐死她的模特告诉 BBC，她感到“窒息和害怕”
items.summary_zh: 韦斯特声称，在音乐录影带中的遭遇是“挑衅性戏剧表演”的一部分。

items.title: Pakistan launches deadly air strikes in Afghanistan, reigniting tensions
items.summary: The fresh strikes come after weeks of relative calm in the restive border region between the two countries.
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦对阿富汗发动致命空袭，重燃紧张局势
items.summary_zh: 新的袭击发生之前，两国边境地区动荡不安，经历了数周的相对平静。

items.title: A Twist in Ukraine’s Drone Campaign Is ‘Really Hurting the Russians’
items.summary: Midrange attacks, using upgraded drones that Ukraine produces in huge numbers, are causing fuel shortages and complicating troop rotations.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰无人机行动的转变“确实伤害了俄罗斯人”
items.summary_zh: 使用乌克兰大量生产的升级版无人机进行的中程攻击正在导致燃料短缺，并使部队轮换变得更加复杂。

items.title: Bitcoin Layer 2 Botanix to wind down network, urges users to withdraw assets
items.summary: Botanix to wind down Bitcoin Layer 2 after four years, citing weak fee revenue and urging users to withdraw assets by July 9.
items.title_zh: 比特币 Layer 2 Botanix 关闭网络，敦促用户撤回资产
items.summary_zh: Botanix 将在四年后逐步关闭比特币 Layer 2，理由是费用收入疲软，并敦促用户在 7 月 9 日之前提取资产。

items.title: Introducing North Mini Code: Cohere’s First Model For Developers
items.title_zh: North Mini Code 简介：Cohere 为开发人员提供的第一个模型

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
items.summary: We've been busy! Here’s a rundown of the top announcements, launches and demos at I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 I/O 2026 上宣布的 100 件事
items.summary_zh: 我们一直很忙！以下是 I/O 2026 上最重要的公告、发布和演示的摘要。

items.title: Startup’s nuclear-inspired cooling system could make data centers more sustainable
items.summary: Founded by two researchers from MIT, Ferveret reduces the amount of energy and water required to cool the chips that power AI.
items.title_zh: 初创公司的核冷却系统可以使数据中心更具可持续性
items.summary_zh: Ferveret 由麻省理工学院的两名研究人员创立，可减少冷却人工智能芯片所需的能源和水量。

items.title: The crucial human component in computing and AI
items.summary: The MIT Ethics of Computing Research Symposium brought together experts and researchers working at the heart of ethical and social impact in technology.
items.title_zh: 计算和人工智能中至关重要的人类组成部分
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院计算机伦理研究研讨会汇集了从事技术伦理和社会影响核心工作的专家和研究人员。

items.title: NSF renews support for MIT-led AI and physics institute, expanding a new model for discovery
items.summary: IAIFI enters its second phase with increased funding, broader ambitions, and a growing community at the frontier of AI and fundamental physics.
items.title_zh: NSF 继续支持麻省理工学院领导的人工智能和物理研究所，拓展新的发现模式
items.summary_zh: IAIFI 进入第二阶段，资金增加、雄心勃勃，人工智能和基础物理学前沿社区不断壮大。

items.title: Beijing escalating AI espionage to catch up with the U.S. on tech, cybersecurity firm says
items.summary: U.S. cybersecurity giant CrowdStrike said China-based entities made over half of state-sponsored cyberattacks on tech firms for artificial intelligence assets.
items.title_zh: 网络安全公司称，北京正在升级人工智能间谍活动，以在科技领域赶上美国
items.summary_zh: 美国网络安全巨头 CrowdStrike 表示，超过一半的国家资助的针对科技公司的人工智能资产网络攻击是由中国实体发起的。

items.title: JPMorgan Chase plans to deploy more powerful AI agents this year
items.summary: JPMorgan Chase's move suggests long-running AI agents are close to clearing the security and governance hurdles that have slowed adoption inside big companies.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通计划今年部署更强大的人工智能代理
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通的举动表明，长期运行的人工智能代理即将消除阻碍大公司内部采用的安全和治理障碍。

items.title: Electric vehicle giant BYD predicts 80% of China car sales will soon be electric
items.summary: BYD expects China's competitive electric vehicle market to continue growing, even as manufacturers and analysts anticipate domestic demand to taper further.
items.title_zh: 电动汽车巨头比亚迪预测中国汽车销量的80%很快将是电动汽车
items.summary_zh: 比亚迪预计，尽管制造商和分析师预计国内需求将进一步减少，但中国竞争激烈的电动汽车市场将继续增长。

items.title: This startup wants to reduce payment friction on prediction markets
items.summary: EDGE Markets is announcing two new products to solve payment issues in prediction markets, the company shared exclusively with CNBC.
items.title_zh: 这家初创公司希望减少预测市场的支付摩擦
items.summary_zh: EDGE Markets 向 CNBC 独家透露，该公司宣布推出两款新产品，以解决预测市场的支付问题。

items.title: Hong Kong's IPO boom is developing a performance problem
items.summary: As Hong Kong vies with Wall Street to be the top IPO market, a growing number of pre-debut runups turn sour after their listing.
items.title_zh: 香港IPO热潮正引发绩效问题
items.summary_zh: 随着香港与华尔街争夺最大的IPO市场，越来越多的上市前股价在上市后表现不佳。

items.title: China poaches more AI talent from the U.S. as it eyes the next 'super-app'
items.summary: Tencent Chief AI Scientist Yao Shunyu, who joined the company from OpenAI, said Friday he aims to pursue artificial general intelligence.
items.title_zh: 中国从美国挖走更多人工智能人才，着眼下一个“超级应用”
items.summary_zh: 从 OpenAI 加入腾讯的首席人工智能科学家姚舜宇周五表示，他的目标是追求通用人工智能。

items.title: US strikes Iran in response to downing of military helicopter
items.summary: President Donald Trump earlier accused Iran of shooting down the US helicopter over the Strait of Hormuz and vowed to respond.
items.title_zh: 美国因军用直升机被击落而袭击伊朗
items.summary_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普早些时候指责伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡击落美国直升机，并誓言做出回应。

items.title: Manslaughter charges laid over deadly Hong Kong fire
items.summary: The Wang Fuk Court blaze last year was the deadliest that Hong Kong had seen in 70 years, killing 168 people.
items.title_zh: 香港致命火灾被控过失杀人罪
items.summary_zh: 去年宏福苑大火是香港70年来最严重的火灾，造成168人死亡。

items.title: Manhunt under way in South Africa after 12 killed in mass shooting in Johannesburg
items.summary: Another nine people were injured at an informal settlement in Cleveland late on Tuesday.
items.title_zh: 约翰内斯堡大规模枪击事件造成 12 人死亡，南非正在进行搜捕
items.summary_zh: 周二晚间，克利夫兰一处非正式定居点另有九人受伤。

items.title: Nasa names next astronauts for Artemis Moon programme
items.summary: Nasa names its next Artemis crew, though they will not be walking on the Moon or even going anywhere near it.
items.title_zh: 美国宇航局任命阿尔忒弥斯月球计划的下一任宇航员
items.summary_zh: 美国宇航局任命了下一批阿尔忒弥斯宇航员，尽管他们不会在月球上行走，甚至不会去任何靠近月球的地方。

items.title: Alleged Bondi Beach gunman charged with another 19 offences
items.summary: Naveed Akram, 24, is already facing 59 charges over an attack on a Jewish festival in December.
items.title_zh: 邦迪海滩枪手被控另外 19 项罪行
items.summary_zh: 24 岁的纳维德·阿克拉姆 (Naveed Akram) 因 12 月袭击犹太节日而面临 59 项指控。

items.title: Night of Violence Grips Belfast After Stabbing Attack
items.summary: Cars and a bus were set on fire and families were driven from their homes as the stabbing attack caused tensions to spill onto the streets.
items.title_zh: 刺伤袭击后贝尔法斯特陷入暴力之夜
items.summary_zh: 由于持刀袭击导致紧张局势蔓延到街道上，汽车和公共汽车被纵火焚烧，许多家庭被赶出家门。

items.title: On the Eve of the World Cup, U.S. Immigration Policy Turns Some Away
items.summary: Some fans and participants hoping to enter the United States for the World Cup have complained that restrictive immigration rules have presented a roadblock.
items.title_zh: 世界杯前夕，美国移民政策拒绝一些人
items.summary_zh: 一些希望进入美国观看世界杯的球迷和参赛者抱怨说，限制性的移民规定设置了障碍。

items.title: ‘Clumsy Diplomacy’: Inside the U.S.-Kenya Feud Over an Ebola Camp
items.summary: Hundreds of Kenyans have marched through the streets to oppose a quarantine facility that would be reserved exclusively for American patients.
items.title_zh: “笨拙的外交”：美国与肯尼亚围绕埃博拉营地的争执
items.summary_zh: 数百名肯尼亚人走上街头游行，反对专门为美国患者保留的隔离设施。

items.title: Argentina’s World Cup Sticker Albums Are a Low-Tech Craze Immune to the Digital Revolution
items.summary: World Cup sticker albums have captivated children and adults in Argentina, in a collecting fever that seems immune to the digital revolution.
items.title_zh: 阿根廷世界杯贴纸专辑是一种不受数字革命影响的低科技热潮
items.summary_zh: 世界杯贴纸专辑吸引了阿根廷的儿童和成年人，他们的收藏热潮似乎不受数字革命的影响。

items.title: XRP market shows signs of capitulation as holders sell at loss
items.summary: XRP holders are capitulating, according to data tracked by Glassnode. That suggests a bottom may be near.
items.title_zh: XRP 市场出现投降迹象，持有者亏本出售
items.summary_zh: 根据 Glassnode 追踪的数据，XRP 持有者正在投降。这表明底部可能即将来临。

items.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO is four times oversubscribed. A crypto bet tells a more cautious story
items.summary: The SPCX perpetual still trades above SpaceX’s $135 offer price, but it has fallen sharply from its May highs as traders mark down the first-day premium.
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 SpaceX 首次公开募股 (IPO) 获得四倍超额认购。加密货币赌注讲述了一个更加谨慎的故事
items.summary_zh: SPCX 永续合约的交易价格仍高于 SpaceX 135 美元的报价，但随着交易员下调首日溢价，其价格已较 5 月高点大幅下跌。

items.title: Crypto tax bills a work-in-progress as U.S. House lawmakers pose concerns
items.summary: The effort to push several tax bills is meant to be bipartisan, but the parties may not be comfortable with all details of the seven bills weighed by the panel.
items.title_zh: 美国众议院议员提出担忧，加密税法案正在进行中
items.summary_zh: 推动几项税收法案的努力本应是两党共同努力的，但两党可能对专家组权衡的七项法案的所有细节感到不满意。

items.title: Securitize CEO says tokenized stocks could unlock a $5 trillion crypto market
items.summary: At a panel at ETHConf, Carlos Domingo argued that bringing stocks and exchange-traded funds onchain could unlock a market far larger than today's roughly $30 billion tokenized asset sector.
items.title_zh: Securitize 首席执行官表示，代币化股票可以解锁 5 万亿美元的加密市场
items.summary_zh: 在 ETHConf 的一次小组讨论中，卡洛斯·多明戈 (Carlos Domingo) 认为，将股票和交易所交易基金引入链上可以释放一个远大于当今约 300 亿美元的代币化资产领域的市场。

items.title: UK financial regulator moves to allow mutual funds 10% exposure to crypto ETNs
items.summary: The Financial Conduct Authority proposed allowing some investment schemes to add exposure to crypto exchange-traded notes.
items.title_zh: 英国金融监管机构允许共同基金 10% 投资加密货币 ETN
items.summary_zh: 金融行为监管局提议允许一些投资计划增加对加密货币交易所交易票据的投资。

items.title: Kalshi requires traders to disclose employers to curb insider trading in sensitive markets
items.summary: The prediction markets platform also introduced a risk-scoring system and whistleblower tools to ensure market integrity.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希要求交易员披露雇主信息，以遏制敏感市场的内幕交易
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台还引入了风险评分系统和举报工具，以确保市场诚信。

items.title: House crypto tax hearing reveals divide over urgency in advancing legislation
items.summary: A House committee hearing on the taxation of digital assets offered a glimpse into lawmakers' views, highlighting rifts in approaches.
items.title_zh: 众议院加密货币税收听证会揭示了推进立法紧迫性的分歧
items.summary_zh: 众议院委员会关于数字资产征税的听证会让我们了解了立法者的观点，凸显了方法上的分歧。

items.title: Hyperliquid advocate and Paradigm urge US to revise proposed anti-money laundering rule
items.summary: The Hyperliquid-backed lobby group and Paradigm seek to prevent rules that would limit decentralized stablecoin usage on public blockchains.
items.title_zh: 超流动性倡导者和范式敦促美国修改拟议的反洗钱规则
items.summary_zh: Hyperliquid 支持的游说团体和 Paradigm 寻求阻止限制公共区块链上去中心化稳定币使用的规则。

items.title: ‘Third leg of the stool:’ House lawmakers set to debate crypto tax bills as questions still loom
items.summary: Lawmakers are set to debate several cryptocurrency tax bills amid growing questions over how tax rules should apply to digital assets.
items.title_zh: “凳子的第三条腿”：众议院议员将就加密税法案进行辩论，因为问题仍然存在
items.summary_zh: 随着税收规则如何适用于数字资产的问题越来越多，立法者将就几项加密货币税收法案进行辩论。

items.title: From data to decisions: how LSEG is scaling trusted AI
items.summary: See how LSEG uses OpenAI to scale trusted AI across its global business, accelerating insights, shrinking release cycles, and empowering 4,000 employees.
